name: Kaspersky EDR Expert
description: Integrates with Kaspersky EDR Expert REST API for endpoint detection, incident management, host isolation, and automated threat response

actions.name: List Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve EDR alerts with filtering and pagination options

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting offset for pagination

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (critical, high, medium, low, informational)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by alert status (new, inProgress, resolved)

actions.name: Get Alert Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific alert

parameters.name: alert_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the alert

actions.name: List Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve EDR incidents that group related alerts into unified security events

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of incidents to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting offset for pagination

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by incident status

actions.name: List Hosts
actions.description: Retrieve the list of hosts (endpoints) managed by Kaspersky EDR

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of hosts to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting offset for pagination

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search term for hostname or IP address

actions.name: Get Host Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific host

parameters.name: host_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the host

actions.name: Isolate Host
actions.description: Isolate a host from the network to prevent lateral movement during incident response

parameters.name: host_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the host to isolate

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment explaining the reason for isolation

actions.name: Unisolate Host
actions.description: Remove network isolation from a previously isolated host

parameters.name: host_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the host to unisolate

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment explaining the reason for removing isolation

actions.name: Create IOC Scan Task
actions.description: Create a task to scan hosts for specific indicators of compromise using YARA rules or IOC definitions

parameters.name: host_ids
parameters.description: JSON array of host IDs to scan

parameters.name: ioc_type
parameters.description: Type of IOC: file_hash, yara_rule, openioc

parameters.name: ioc_value
parameters.description: The IOC value or content to scan for

actions.name: Get Task Status
actions.description: Retrieve the status and results of a previously created response task

parameters.name: task_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the task
